heading: ***HEAT ADVISORY IN THE CHAMPLAIN AND HUDSON VALLEYS, THE CT VALLEY SOUTH OF WHITE RIVER, AND SOUTH OF THE WHITE MOUNTAINS IN NH, THIS AFTERNOON AND EVENING***Today
text: Areas of valley burning off to periods of sun. Hot and humid. Scattered afternoon showers or locally strong thunderstorms developing, mostly in NY, reaching western VT late. Highs in the upper 80s to low 90s. Winds light, becoming south to southwest 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A period of evening showers and locally strong thunderstorms, likely from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north, scattered south. Clearing after midnight, last over the northern mountains. Lows in the upper 50s to low 60s. Winds west near 10 mph, diminishing to light.

heading: Saturday
text: Becoming mostly sunny. Not as warm, and less humid. Highs in the 70s to near 80 north, in the 80s south. Light winds becoming northwest 5 to 15 mph.
